name_en: 【Haiyuan Exclusive】Dynamic Chip M11839 Cashmere Tote. This Bella handbag is from the LV Ski series, incorporating wool trim on exquisite perforated velvet leather to showcase a cozy texture for the season. The Monogram perforated pattern continues the iconic element, while chain accents add a finishing touch. The circular coin pocket ensures secure storage.
name_cn:
【Haiyuan Exclusive】Dynamic Chip M11839 Cashmere Tote. Size 22x14x19cm (Height x Width x Length)
